headers.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(self), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://pepewife.io https://www.pwifecoin.fun; connect-src 'self' https://api.coingecko.com https://api.devnet.solana.com https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com wss://api.devnet.solana.com wss://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com https://*.helius-rpc.com wss://*.helius-rpc.com https://*.quiknode.pro wss://*.quiknode.pro; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
